# glitchtip Provider

The GlitchTip provider manages organizations, teams, projects, alerts, and uptime monitors in a [GlitchTip](https://glitchtip.com) instance via its REST API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    glitchtip = {
      source = "samiracho/glitchtip"
    }
  }
}

provider "glitchtip" {
  # Base URL of your GlitchTip instance. Defaults to https://app.glitchtip.com.
  # May also be set with the GLITCHTIP_ENDPOINT environment variable.
  endpoint = "https://glitchtip.example.com"

  # API token created under Profile -> Auth Tokens.
  # May also be set with the GLITCHTIP_TOKEN environment variable.
  token = var.glitchtip_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Base URL of the GlitchTip instance, without a trailing `/api` path (e.g. `https://glitchtip.example.com`). May also be set with the `GLITCHTIP_ENDPOINT` environment variable. Defaults to `https://app.glitchtip.com`.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) GlitchTip API authentication token (created under *Profile -> Auth Tokens*). May also be set with the `GLITCHTIP_TOKEN` environment variable.
